_comment: Copy this file to ~/.claude/chat-watch/chats.json and edit. Personal data (chat IDs, prompts that name colleagues) MUST NOT be checked into the repo.

_field_docs.label: Short identifier — used for state-<label>.json filename and for --chat <label> CLI arg. Must be unique. Keep it ASCII / filesystem-safe.
_field_docs.id: Microsoft Teams chat id (the long '19:...@thread.v2' or '19:...@unq.gbl.spaces' string). Find it via `teams-cli list-chats`.
_field_docs.prompt_template: Path to the gating prompt for this chat. Relative paths resolve against the directory containing chats.json (i.e. ~/.claude/chat-watch/), so 'prompts/foo.txt' means '~/.claude/chat-watch/prompts/foo.txt'.
_field_docs.max_replies_per_hour: Hard cap on replies in a rolling 60-minute window. Suggested: 5 for active group chats, 2 for 1:1s.
_field_docs.per_thread_cooldown_minutes: After replying in a 'thread' (in practice, the message id, since group chats lack threading), wait this long before replying to the same id again. Suggested: 10 for groups, 30 for 1:1s.
_field_docs.dry_run: If true, log decisions but post nothing. Useful while tuning a new prompt before going live.
